Backpack (empty).special_description: Holds 1 cubic foot or 30 pounds of gear (Small characters: 1/4 weight and capacity). Common adventurer's pack.

Barrel (empty).special_description: Large empty barrel. Holds a significant volume of liquid or goods.

Bedroll.special_description: Basic sleeping gear for camping. Small characters version weighs 1/4.

Bell.special_description: Small bell for signaling or alarms.

Blanket, winter.special_description: Heavy blanket for cold weather. Small characters version weighs 1/4.

Block and tackle.special_description: Pulley system for lifting or pulling heavy loads.

Bottle, wine, glass.special_description: Glass bottle, typically for wine or other liquids.

Caltrops.special_description: One 2 lb. bag covers a 5-foot square. Creature entering or fighting in the area may step on one (attack +0, ignores shield/armor/deflection; +2 AC if wearing footwear). Deals 1 damage and halves speed for 24 hours (or until DC 15 Heal or 1+ magical healing). Charging/running creature stops immediately. Creatures moving at half speed or slower can avoid. May not affect unusual opponents.

Candle.special_description: Dimly illuminates a 5-foot radius. Burns for 1 hour.

Canvas (sq. yd.).special_description: Square yard of canvas for tents, sails, or repairs.

Case, map or scroll.special_description: Protective case for maps or scrolls (½ lb.).

Chain (10 ft.).special_description: 10 feet of chain. Hardness 10, 5 hit points. Burst DC 26 Strength check.

Crowbar.special_description: Grants +2 circumstance bonus on Strength checks to pry open doors, chests, etc. In combat, treat as one-handed improvised weapon dealing bludgeoning damage equal to a club of its size.

Firewood (per day).special_description: Enough firewood for one day's fire.

Flint and steel.special_description: Lighting a torch takes a full-round action; other fires take at least that long.

Grappling hook.special_description: Throwing requires Use Rope check (DC 10, +2 per 10 feet of distance).

Hammer.special_description: In combat, treat as one-handed improvised weapon dealing bludgeoning damage equal to a spiked gauntlet of its size.

Ink (1 oz. vial).special_description: Black ink. Other colors cost twice as much.

Jug, clay.special_description: Clay jug with stopper. Holds 1 gallon of liquid.

Lamp, common.special_description: Clearly illuminates 15-foot radius, shadowy out to 30 feet. Burns 6 hours on a pint of oil. Carried in one hand.

Lantern, bullseye.special_description: Clear illumination in 60-foot cone, shadowy in 120-foot cone. Burns 6 hours on a pint of oil. Carried in one hand.

Lantern, hooded.special_description: Clearly illuminates 30-foot radius, shadowy out to 60 feet. Burns 6 hours on a pint of oil. Carried in one hand. Can be shuttered.

Lock (very simple).special_description: Very simple lock. Open Lock DC 20.

Manacles.special_description: Binds a Medium creature. Escape Artist DC 30 (or 35 for masterwork). Strength burst DC 26 (28 masterwork). Hardness 10, 10 hp. Most have locks (add lock cost separately). Small version same cost; Large x10; Huge x100. Special sizes for other creatures.

Manacles, masterwork.special_description: Masterwork manacles. Better quality: Escape Artist DC 35, Strength DC 28. Otherwise same as standard manacles.

Oil (1-pint flask).special_description: Burns 6 hours in a lantern. Can be used as splash weapon (full-round to prepare fuse; 50% chance to ignite on throw; otherwise like alchemist's fire but no ongoing). Pour on 5 ft. square (smooth surface): burns 2 rounds, 1d3 fire damage to creatures in area.

Pick, miner’s.special_description: Miner's pick for digging or prying.

Piton.special_description: Iron spike for climbing or securing rope.

Pole, 10-foot.special_description: 10-foot pole for probing, testing, or reaching.

Pouch, belt (empty).special_description: Belt pouch. Holds small items. Small characters version 1/4 weight/capacity.

Ram, portable.special_description: Iron-shod wooden beam. +2 circumstance bonus on Strength checks to break open doors. Allows a second person to help without rolling (increasing bonus by 2 total).

Rations, trail (per day).special_description: Trail rations for one day. Small characters version weighs 1/4.

Rope, hempen (50 ft.).special_description: 50 feet of hemp rope. 2 hit points. Burst DC 23 Strength check.

Rope, silk (50 ft.).special_description: 50 feet of silk rope. 4 hit points. Burst DC 24. Supple: +2 circumstance bonus on Use Rope checks.

Sack (empty).special_description: Empty sack. Small characters version 1/4 weight and capacity.

Signet ring.special_description: Signet ring for sealing documents or identification.

Sledge.special_description: Heavy sledgehammer for breaking or construction.

Spyglass.special_description: Objects viewed through a spyglass are magnified to twice their size.

Tent.special_description: Basic tent for shelter. Small characters version weighs 1/4.

Torch.special_description: Burns for 1 hour. Clearly illuminates 20-foot radius, shadowy out to 40 feet. In combat: one-handed improvised weapon (bludgeoning equal to gauntlet of size) +1 point fire damage.

Vial, ink or potion.special_description: Vial holds 1 ounce of liquid. Typically 1 inch wide and 3 inches high, stoppered.

Waterskin.special_description: Waterskin for carrying water (holds ~1/2 gallon when full). Small characters version 1/4 weight.

Acid (flask).special_description: Thrown as ranged touch attack (range increment 10 ft.). Direct hit: 1d6 acid damage. Splash (5 ft. radius): 1 acid damage. Can be made with Craft (alchemy).

Alchemist’s fire (flask).special_description: Thrown as ranged touch attack (range increment 10 ft.). Direct hit: 1d6 fire. Splash (5 ft.): 1 fire. On following round, target takes additional 1d6 fire unless extinguished (full-round action, DC 15 Reflex; +2 if rolling on ground; automatic in water/magical extinguish). Can be made with Craft (alchemy).

Antitoxin (vial).special_description: Drinking gives +5 alchemical bonus on Fortitude saves against poison for 1 hour. Can be made with Craft (alchemy).

Everburning torch.special_description: Normal torch with continual flame spell. Clearly illuminates 20-foot radius, shadowy out to 40 feet. Does not burn fuel or go out. Cannot be made with Craft (alchemy) in the same way as other items.

Holy water (flask).special_description: Damages undead and evil outsiders like acid. Thrown as ranged touch (range increment 10 ft.). Direct hit: 2d4 damage. Splash (5 ft.): 1 damage. Against incorporeal: must be adjacent and poured (ranged touch, no AoO). Temples of good deities sell at cost.

Smokestick.special_description: Ignited stick creates thick opaque smoke filling a 10-foot cube (like fog cloud, but moderate+ wind dissipates in 1 round). Stick consumed after 1 round. Can be made with Craft (alchemy).

Sunrod.special_description: 1-foot iron rod with gold tip. Glows brightly when struck. Clear illumination 30-foot radius, shadowy 60-foot. Lasts 6 hours (gold tip burns out and worthless after). Can be made with Craft (alchemy).

special: stuck creatures: move half speed or DC 17 Strength/15 slashing dmg to free
Tanglefoot bag.special_description: Thrown as ranged touch attack (range increment 10 ft.). On hit, target entangled (DC 15 Reflex negates). Entangled creature moves at half speed or is glued in place. To break free: DC 17 Strength or 15 damage with slashing weapon (auto hit on goo). Assisting creature does not need attack roll. Spellcasters must make DC 15 Concentration to cast while stuck. Goo becomes brittle after 2d4 rounds. Universal solvent dissolves immediately. Can be made with Craft (alchemy).

Thunderstone.special_description: Thrown as ranged attack (range increment 20 ft.; aim at 5 ft. square AC 5). On hard surface or struck: deafening bang. All in 10 ft. radius: DC 15 Fort or deafened 1 hour (-4 initiative, 20% chance miscast verbal spells). Can be made with Craft (alchemy).

Tindertwig.special_description: Alchemical stick ignites on rough surface. Lighting a torch: standard action (not full-round). Other fires at least standard action. Much faster than flint and steel or magnifying glass. Can be made with Craft (alchemy).

Alchemist’s lab.special_description: Always has the perfect tool for making alchemical items. +2 circumstance bonus on Craft (alchemy) checks. Does not reduce material costs. Without a lab, assumed to have basic tools but no +2 bonus.

Artisan’s tools.special_description: Special tools for any craft. Without them: -2 penalty on Craft checks (or impossible).

Artisan’s tools, masterwork.special_description: Masterwork version of artisan’s tools. +2 circumstance bonus on Craft checks made with them.

Climber’s kit.special_description: Perfect tool for climbing. +2 circumstance bonus on Climb checks. Small characters version weighs 1/4.

Disguise kit.special_description: Perfect tool for disguise. +2 circumstance bonus on Disguise checks. Exhausted after ten uses. Small characters version weighs 1/4.

Healer’s kit.special_description: Perfect tool for healing. +2 circumstance bonus on Heal checks. Exhausted after ten uses.

Holly and mistletoe.special_description: Common divine focus for druids (and some clerics/paladins of nature deities).

Holy symbol, wooden.special_description: Wooden holy symbol. Focuses positive energy for clerics/paladins (turning undead, spell focus). Each religion has its own.

Holy symbol, silver.special_description: Silver holy symbol. Same as wooden but more expensive/durable. Unholy symbols focus negative energy (evil clerics or neutral casters of evil spells/command undead).

Hourglass.special_description: Measures 1 hour (or other standard times depending on size). Bulky but accurate for the duration.

Magnifying glass.special_description: Allows closer look at small objects. +2 circumstance bonus on Appraise checks for small or highly detailed items. Can substitute for flint and steel to start fires (requires bright sunlight, tinder, at least full-round action).

Musical instrument, common.special_description: Common musical instrument. Small characters version weighs 1/4.

Musical instrument, masterwork.special_description: Masterwork instrument. +2 circumstance bonus on Perform checks involving its use. Small characters version weighs 1/4.

Scale, merchant’s.special_description: Merchant's scale. +2 circumstance bonus on Appraise checks for items valued by weight (including precious metals).

Spell component pouch.special_description: Assumed to contain all material components and focuses for spellcasting except those with specific cost, divine focuses, and focuses that wouldn’t fit in a pouch.

Spellbook, wizard’s (blank).special_description: Blank wizard's spellbook with 100 pages of parchment. Each spell takes one page per spell level (0-level spells take one page each).

Thieves’ tools.special_description: Kit for Disable Device and Open Lock. Without these tools: -2 circumstance penalty on those checks (must improvise).

Thieves’ tools, masterwork.special_description: Masterwork thieves' tools. Extra/better tools grant +2 circumstance bonus on Disable Device and Open Lock checks.

Tool, masterwork.special_description: Well-made tool for a specific job. Grants +2 circumstance bonus on a related skill check (if any). Multiple masterwork bonuses toward the same check do not stack.

Water clock.special_description: Large bulky device accurate to within half an hour per day since last set. Requires water source and must be kept still (marks time by regulated water droplets).
